title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
